name: friendarr
description: Standalone downloading service for Friend Libraries — fetches media from remote Seerr, Plex, Emby, and Jellyfin instances

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/ui && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/ui/tailwind.css -o dist/ui/tailwind.css --minify && cp src/ui/index.html src/ui/i18n.js dist/ui/
scripts.dev: tsc && mkdir -p dist/ui && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/ui/tailwind.css -o dist/ui/tailwind.css --minify && cp src/ui/index.html src/ui/i18n.js dist/ui/ && tsc --watch & sleep 2 && node --watch dist/index.js
scripts.docker:build: docker build --build-arg COMMIT_TAG=$(git rev-parse HEAD) -t friendarr:latest -f Dockerfile .
scripts.docker:release: pnpm docker:build && pnpm docker:tag && pnpm docker:push
